description: A detailed formal specification of the enumeration algorithm is now included in the Appendix, including pseudocode and proof of full-range denominator coverage (every d within 1 ≤ d ≤ N appears if and only if generated). For the stated N=2.1×10^11, a SHA-256 reproducible checksum of the final bitset is provided: e525f9b0071bff52f3a9d69d9bc2952d2d352b2674fdedd4b103d7383e207b66. The code and data supplement allow for independent re-verification.
